meta.name: Magneta Sprint D #3 wire — optimism
meta.description: Sprint D #3 redeploy of MagnetaOFTStandardFactory. Wires the new factory (0xa2338eFd7eb2DD56750bFee961b7ffe2CC30D17b) so cross-chain CREATE_TOKEN lands on it AND the new factory auto-registers freshly-minted tokens with TokenOpsModule (0xDe1752E266C3978240014DFc616dd34EbF9cDF31) so users can MINT/UPDATE/ FREEZE without an extra registerByTokenOwner tx. Sign with Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a.
